description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a prominent cylindrical underbarrel attachment, likely a grenade launcher, mounted beneath the main barrel. The rifle has a skeletonized folding stock, which is thin and angular, providing a lightweight yet sturdy support for the user. The receiver and handguard are streamlined, with ventilation holes along the handguard for heat dissipation. The pistol grip is ergonomic and textured for secure handling, and the trigger guard is integrated into the lower receiver. Iron sights are mounted on the top rail, and the muzzle is simple, lacking any visible flash hider or suppressor. The overall design is compact and utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical operations.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a folding skeletonized stock and an underbarrel grenade launcher, featuring iron sights and a streamlined, compact design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and underbarrel attachment, with the iron sight visible at the top.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the full length of the rifle, the folding skeletonized stock, pistol grip, and underbarrel grenade launcher.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the thin profile of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and underbarrel attachment.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the same features as the right, with clear visibility of the handguard, stock, and underbarrel attachment.
